name: Italian Beef and Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen sliced roast beef, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bottom round roast in a pan with water and salt and pepper over high heat (550°F) for 15 minutes.
2. Reduce the heat to medium-high (450°F) and continue cooking for another 15 minutes.
3. Lower the heat again to low (350°F) and cook for an additional 15 minutes or until the meat thermometer reads rare.
4. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. Drain the meat juices and reserve them.
5. Refrigerate the meat overnight.
6. Slice the meat very thinly.
7. For sandwiches, use the sliced roast beef on French bread or hard rolls.
8. To make Italian beef sandwiches:
a. In a saucepan, combine bouillon, consomme, or canned broth with pan drippings and olive oil.
b. Sprinkle oregano over the mixture.
c. Add chopped green peppers and cook until tender.
d. Incorporate the sliced roast beef (freshly carved or thawed from frozen).
e. Serve on French bread or hard rolls.
Note: Cook all ingredients thoroughly before serving to ensure food safety.
